byBrandi Martin

GEORGETOWN COUNTY, S.C. (WPDE)  —Georgetown County will celebrate one of its very own with a parade this fall.

Residents can gather to celebrateOlympic medalist Melissa Jefferson and her representation of the county at this past summer's Paris Olympics.

RECOMMENDED:Grand Strand Shell Club shells out invitation for beach trips, meetings

The parade will take place on Front Street in Georgetown at 10 a.m. on October 12. Those who wish to participate can line up at East Bay Park at 8 a.m.

The Olympian celebration will follow from 3 p.m. to 7 p.m. at Choppee Complex.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Georgetown Co. parade to honor local Olympic medalist Melissa Jefferson
